6. (allocate_vehicle_unit destination_availability_north vehicle_unit_north_destination)  # any vehicle
7. (allocate_vehicle_unit shift_candidate_north_primary vehicle_unit_north_linehaul)  # for preparedness

Now attach task profiles:

10. (attach_task_profile shift_candidate_north_primary route_task_profile_north)

Now confirm preparedness:

12. (confirm_candidate_preparedness destination_availability_north route_task_profile_north)
13. (confirm_candidate_preparedness shift_candidate_north_primary route_task_profile_north)

Now we need to activate origin and destination nodes:

15. (activate_destination_node destination_availability_north destination_node_north route_task_profile_north)  # makes destination_node_ready

Now assign operator to origin_availability for locking:

17. (lock_origin_availability origin_availability_north origin_node_north driver_operator_north)  # gives locked and confirmed
18. (release_operator_resource origin_availability_north driver_operator_north)  # operator becomes available again

Similarly for destination:

20. (lock_destination_availability destination_availability_north destination_node_north driver_operator_north)  # gives locked and confirmed
21. (release_operator_resource destination_availability_north driver_operator_north)

Now we can assemble transport leg (nominal, since both nodes ready and both availability confirmed):
22. (assemble_transport_leg origin_availability_north destination_availability_north origin_node_north destination_node_north transport_leg_north)  # gives transport_leg_assembled, origin_linked, destination_linked, not loaded

Now authorize loading:
23. (authorize_transport_leg_loading transport_leg_north origin_availability_north route_task_profile_north)  # requires origin_availability_locked (true) and task_profile linked (true), gives transport_leg_loading_authorized

Now load container onto leg. Need shift_candidate_north_primary prepared and linked:

Now we need to stage the candidate:

27. (assign_operator_resource shift_candidate_north_primary driver_operator_north)  # operator becomes unavailable

29. (release_operator_resource shift_candidate_north_primary driver_operator_north)  # operator available again
Optionally release skill cert? Not needed.

Now assign compliance certificate:

Now establish clearance:

Now finalize directly (since no route_sequence_context_set):
32. (finalize_candidate_direct shift_candidate_north_primary)  # gives candidate_finalized and dispatch_ready
